description: FGAP-038: add a per-spec in-execution self-check for the quarterly review-cadence discipline at the review-loop step, reusing the existing cadence logic, mirroring T3/T4; the discipline already has a generation contract + a post-hoc check but no in-execution gate.
acceptance_criteria: During generation of the review-loop step, the step's self-check fails when the review loop has fewer than four evaluate-and-adjust checkpoints or its earliest checkpoint is not before 1 December, and passes otherwise; demonstrated on a deficient input.
Over a full assembled draft, the review loop has at least four checkpoints with the earliest before 1 December, confirmed by a whole-draft check.

No previously-passing check moves from passing to failing: outputs parse, the catalogue-gate raises no new rejection, the parity gate passes 14/14, the project gate is green, and every existing in-execution and whole-draft check stays passing.
